category_sources: source_facts.description says utility for downloading TV and radio programmes from BBC iPlayer; official README describes BBC iPlayer/BBC Sounds downloads and PVR features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is get_iplayer; official GitHub README and wiki use get_iplayer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki documentation page lists release notes, installation, usage, searching, recording, PVR usage, man page, and options; README links to the wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/get-iplayer/get_iplayer; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe BBC iPlayer/BBC Sounds downloading, programme indexing, PVR, and command-line usage.
